info.title: Outbrain Amplify API
info.description: Outbrain's Amplify API for managing native advertising campaigns, budgets, and promoted content.

get.description: Authenticate using Basic auth credentials to obtain an API token.

OB_Token.description: The API token to use for subsequent requests.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all marketers associated with the authenticated account.
Retrieve details of a specific marketer by ID.
Retrieve all budgets for a given marketer.

post.description: Create a new budget for a marketer.

get.description: Retrieve a specific budget by ID.
Retrieve all campaigns for a given marketer.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

post.description: Create a new campaign for a marketer.

get.description: Retrieve a specific campaign by ID.

post.description: Create a duplicate of an existing campaign.

put.description: Update multiple campaigns in a single request.

get.description: Retrieve all budgets attached to a campaign.

200.description: A list of budgets attached to the campaign.

post.description: Attach an existing budget to a campaign.

delete.description: Detach a budget from a campaign.

get.description: Retrieve publisher-level bid information for a campaign.

200.description: Publisher bid data for the campaign.

get.description: Retrieve all promoted links (ads) for a campaign.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

post.description: Create a new promoted link (ad) in a campaign.

get.description: Retrieve a specific promoted link by ID.

delete.description: Delete a promoted link by ID.

get.description: Retrieve daily performance metrics for campaigns.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

get.description: Retrieve performance metrics grouped by content.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

get.description: Retrieve performance metrics grouped by publisher.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

get.description: Retrieve all audiences for a marketer.

post.description: Create a new audience for a marketer.

get.description: Retrieve all conversion tags for a marketer.

post.description: Create a new conversion tag for a marketer.

apiToken.name: OB-TOKEN-V1
apiToken.description: API token obtained via the /login endpoint.

basicAuth.description: Basic authentication used only for the /login endpoint.

blockCampaigns.description: Whether campaigns are blocked for this marketer.

shared.description: Whether the budget is shared across campaigns.

suffixTrackingCode.description: Suffix tracking code appended to URLs.

contentType.description: Type of content for the campaign.

onAirReason.description: Reason the campaign is on or off air.

liveStatus.description: Current live status of the campaign.

id.description: Budget ID to associate with the campaign.

suffixTrackingCode.description: Suffix tracking code appended to URLs.

contentType.description: Type of content for the campaign.

onAirReason.description: Reason the campaign is on or off air.

dayParting.description: Days of week for day parting (e.g., MONDAY, TUESDAY).

enabled.description: Whether the promoted link is enabled.

status.description: Approval status of the promoted link.

cachedImageUrl.description: Cached image URL for the ad.

archived.description: Whether the promoted link is archived.

enabled.description: Whether the promoted link is enabled.

cpc.description: Cost per click override for this link.

PerformanceResult.description: Performance metrics for a given entity and time period.
